description: Small fragment from the beginning of a legal deed written by Halfon. b. Menashshe Halevi (fl. 1100–1138 CE). Avraham the judge b. Shabetay is mentioned. It is probably the judge of al-Minyat Zifta who was active there circa 1125 (Med. Soc. II, 47). AA
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
